iOS Sports / EdTech Video Analysis

Coachable

Developed key features for an athletic coaching platform that enables coaches to provide structured feedback through video analysis, performance metrics, and training plans. Built tools that streamline communication between coaches and athletes for improved training outcomes.

The Challenge

Coaching platforms require seamless video recording, upload, analysis, and annotation capabilities — combined with real-time communication and performance tracking. The challenge was to build a fluid experience that handles large video files efficiently while providing coaches with intuitive tools for frame-by-frame analysis and feedback.

Key Contributions

  • Video Analysis Tools: Built video playback with frame-by-frame scrubbing, slow-motion controls, and annotation overlays for coaches to provide visual feedback.
  • Coach-to-Athlete Feedback: Developed a structured feedback system with timestamped comments, drawings on video frames, and actionable recommendations.
  • Performance Tracking: Implemented dashboards with progress charts, training metrics, and historical performance data visualization.
  • Video Upload Pipeline: Created an efficient upload system with background processing, compression, and resume-capable uploads for large video files.
  • Training Schedule: Built training plan management features allowing coaches to assign workouts, drills, and recovery sessions to athletes.

Tech Stack

Swift

Primary development language

AVFoundation

Video playback, recording, and processing

Core Graphics

Drawing annotations on video frames

Charts

Performance data visualization

URLSession

Background uploads and downloads

Push Notifications

Real-time coaching alerts and reminders
